pages.text: Some materials and higher relics do not come from ruins alone. They must be taken from beings powerful enough to stand at the edge of older laws.

$(l)Known entity drops$()$(br)$(li)Wither can yield Oblivion Stone or Colossus Heart$(li)Warden can yield Oblivion Stone or Nebula Lens$(li)Ender Dragon can yield Oblivion Stone or Ember Seed$(li)Elder Guardian can yield Oblivion Stone or Tide Pearl$(li)Shulker yields 4 to 7 Void Ashes
These are not ordinary monster drops. They are signs that the bearer has crossed from scavenging relics into awakening, shaping, and enduring them.
